scenario_description: The user first asks the agent to add a Total row, then after confirmation asks to also add an Average row.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me add a Total row at the bottom that sums each month's data
The Total row is done. Now add an Average row right below it that calculates the mean for each month column, then save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/SalesRep.xlsx'); col0 = df.iloc[:, 0].astype(str).str.lower(); has_total = col0.str.contains('total').any(); has_avg = col0.str.contains('average').any(); print('PASSED' if has_total and has_avg else 'FAILED')"
